title: Can your governance keep pace with your AI ambitions? AI risk intelligence in the agentic era
content: Traditional frameworks designed for static deployments cannot address the dynamic interactions that define agentic workloads. AI Risk Intelligence (AIRI), from AWS Generative AI Innovation Center, provides the automated rigor required to govern agents at enterprise scale—a fundamental reimagining of how security, operations, and governance work together systemically. Artificial Intelligence Can your governance keep pace with your AI ambitions? AI risk intelligence in the agentic era by Segolene Dessertine-Panhard , Sri Elaprolu , Florian Felice , Daniel Ramirez , and Randi Larson on 31 MAR 2026 in Announcements , Generative AI Permalink Comments Share DevOps used to be predictable: same input, same output, binary success, static dependencies, concrete metrics. You could control what you could predict, measure what was concrete, and secure what followed known patterns. Then agentic AI arrived, and everything changed. Agents operate non-deterministically; they don’t follow fixed patterns. Ask the same question twice, get different answers. They select different tools and approaches as they work, rather than following predetermined workflows. Quality exists on a gradient from perfect to fabricated rather than binary pass-fail. Predictable dependencies and processes have given way to autonomous systems that adapt, reason, and act independently. Traditional IT governance frameworks designed for static deployments can’t address these complex multi-system interactions. Organizations face inconsistent security postures across agentic workflows, compliance gaps that vary by deployme
eventKey: can-your-governance-keep-pace-your
normalizedTitle: can your governance keep pace with your ai ambitions ai risk intelligence in the agentic era
scoreReasoning: Significant discussion on AI governance and agentic AI, with potential for future impact on AI development.
summary: DevOps used to be predictable: same input, same output, binary success, static dependencies, concrete metrics. You could control what you could predict, measure what was concrete, and secure what followed known patterns. Then agentic AI arrived, and everything changed.…

title: “特朗普飓风”恐将使中国偏离航向
content: The Economist reports that escalating tensions between the United States and China—termed a “Hurricane Trump” scenario—risk diverting China from its strategic path. Rising U.S. pressure on trade, technology, and security is claimed to push China toward alternative alliances, potentially reshaping regional dynamics and challenging its long‑term goals. The piece argues that sustained U.S. hostility could force China to adjust its foreign‑policy priorities, impacting global stability and economic relationships.

title: 水基础设施会成为伊朗战争中的下一个目标吗？
content: The article examines whether water infrastructure in Iran could become a strategic target amid rising tensions and potential military conflict. It discusses how attackers in modern warfare may aim at essential services to disrupt civilian life and pressure governments. Analysts assess the vulnerability of Iran’s water systems, the political and humanitarian implications of such attacks, and the geopolitical context that could influence decision‑makers regarding targeting water supplies.

title: DeepSeek 连续三天发生服务异常 最长宕机超 10 小时
content: 3 月 29 日至 31 日，DeepSeek 旗下服务连续三天出现不同程度异常，涉及网页对话、App 及 API 等，故障分别持续约 1 小时 48 分、10 小时 13 分和 1 小时 3 分，均已修复，目前服务恢复稳定运行。过去 30 天内，其网页对话服务整体可用性为 98.61%，此次连续服务异常引发行业对 AI 基础设施稳定性的关注。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 3 月 29 日至 31 日， DeepSeek 旗下服务连续三天出现不同程度异常，涉及网页对话、App 及 API 等，故障分别持续约 1 小时 48 分、10 小时 13 分和 1 小时 3 分，均已修复，目前服务恢复稳定运行。过去 30 天内，其网页对话服务整体可用性为 98.61%，此次连续服务异常引发行业对 AI 基础设施稳定性的关注。 2026-03-31 DeepSeek 连续三天发生服务异常 最长宕机超 10 小时 2026-03-30 DeepSeek 服务已恢复正常，此前崩溃约 12 小时 2025-01-27 DeepSeek 服务再次「宕机」 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

summary: DeepSeek’s services experienced consecutive outages from March 29–31, affecting web chat, app, and API components. The disruptions lasted approximately 1 h 48 m, 10 h 13 m, and 1 h 3 m, respectively, and have been resolved. Across the past 30 days, the web chat service’s overall availability was 98.61 %. The incident has raised industry concerns about the reliability of AI infrastructure.

title: Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
content: In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from AWS Cost Explorer, AWS Budgets, and AWS Compute Optimizer into a single interface, so your team can ask questions like "What are my top cost drivers this month?" and receive immediate answers. Artificial Intelligence Build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore by Salman Ahmed , Sergio Barraza , and Ravi Kumar on 31 MAR 2026 in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore , Amazon Cognito , Amazon Elastic Container Registry , Artificial Intelligence , AWS Amplify , AWS Budgets , AWS Cloud Financial Management , AWS CodeBuild , AWS Compute Optimizer , AWS Cost and Usage Report , AWS Cost Explorer , Generative AI Permalink Comments Share Managing costs across multiple AWS accounts often requires finance teams to query data from several sources to get a complete view of spending and optimization opportunities. In this post, you learn how to build a FinOps agent using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that helps your finance team manage AWS costs across multiple accounts. This conversational agent consolidates data from AWS Cost Explorer , AWS Budgets , and AWS Compute Optimizer into a single interface, so your team can ask questions like “What are my top cost drivers this month?” and receive immediate answers. You learn to set up the architecture, deploy the solution using AWS Cloud Development Kit (AWS CDK) , and interact with your cost data through natural language queries. The solution uses Agen
eventKey: build-finops-agent-using-amazon-bedrock
normalizedTitle: build a finops agent using amazon bedrock agentcore
scoreReasoning: 技术工具更新，对开发者工具和工程效率有影响
summary: A guide to building a FinOps conversational agent with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that consolidates AWS Cost Explorer, Budgets, and Compute Optimizer data for natural‑language queries. It uses AWS CDK to deploy authentication (Cognito), containerized MCP servers, an AgentCore Gateway, and a Strands‑powered agent with Claude LLM. The agent supports conversation memory, tool invocation, and cost‑optimization recommendations, all accessible via an Amplify‑hosted web app. The post details architecture, deployment steps, sample queries, and cleanup.

title: 为何中国的“OpenClaw”热潮是一场全球性的人工智能实验
content: China's recent surge in adopting OpenClaw, an AI platform developed by Meta, has become a significant testing ground for artificial intelligence technology. The widespread use across the country showcases how a large, diverse market can rapidly experiment with and refine AI applications. This trend demonstrates that China’s engagement is more than a domestic phenomenon; it offers valuable insights into global AI deployment, user interaction patterns, and the scalability of AI solutions.

title: Encoding Team Standards
content: content Videos Content Index Board Games Photography Thoughtworks Home Insights Careers Radar Engineering follow RSS Mastodon LinkedIn Bluesky X BGG Top The Consistency Problem Executable Governance What This Looks Like Surfacing the tacit knowledge. Where Standards Meet the Workflow Standards as Shared Infrastructure Calibration Conclusion Encoding Team Standards AI coding assistants respond to whoever is prompting, and the quality of what they produce depends on how well the prompter articulates team standards. I propose treating the instructions that govern AI interactions (generation, refactoring, security, review) as infrastructure: versioned, reviewed, and shared artifacts that encode tacit team knowledge into executable instructions, making quality consistent regardless of who is at the keyboard. 31 March 2026 Rahul Garg Rahul is a Principal Engineer at Thoughtworks, based in Gurgaon, India. He is passionate about the craft of building maintainable software through DDD and Clean Architecture, and explores how AI can help teams achieve engineering excellence. generative AI This article is part of a series: Patterns for Reducing Friction in AI-Assisted Development Contents The Consistency Problem Executable Governance What This Looks Like Surfacing the tacit knowledge. Where Standards Meet the Workflow Standards as Shared Infrastructure Calibration Conclusion When a team has worked together long enough, certain practices become invisible. The senior engineer who rejects a pull request does not consult a checklist; she recognizes, almost instantly, that the error handli

title: 别让 AI 写得像 AI：用自己的 83 篇博客训练专属写作助手，顺手做成了一个 Skill
content: Claude Code - @zp872571679 - 用 AI 辅助写文章这件事，我折腾了挺长时间，一直有一个问题没解决：写出来的东西读着不像我写的。语气对，结构对，就是有点 用 AI 辅助写文章这件事，我折腾了挺长时间，一直有一个问题没解决：写出来的东西读着不像我写的。 语气对，结构对，就是有点"飘"——像一个模仿我的人写的，而不是我自己写的。 后来意识到问题在哪：AI 不知道我怎么写东西。我没把自己的内容喂给它，光靠对话里几句描述，它当然摸不准。 解决这个问题花了我一段时间，最后跑通的方案是： 把博客历史文章全部导入 Obsidian 作为知识库，用 Claude Code 分析提炼出风格档案，再把整套工作流封装成一个可复用的 Skill 。 Obsidian：不只是笔记工具，是知识库底座 这件事的关键前提是：Obsidian 存的是本地 Markdown 文件。 这意味着 Claude Code 可以直接读它。不需要 API 对接，不需要导出，直接在终端打开 Vault 目录，Claude Code 就能访问里面的所有内容。 这和把文章发给 AI 让它"记住"有本质区别——后者每次对话结束就清零了，前者是真正持久化的知识库，每次调用都能读到完整的历史内容。 把 83 篇已发布文章放进去之后，它就有了训练材料。 如果想学习 Obsidian 可以看： Obsidian 写作环境搭建：这 6 款插件让我的博客管理效率翻倍 支撑这套流程的几个插件 不是所有插件都和 Claude Code 有关，但有几个直接影响了知识库的可用性。 Git ：Vault 接入 GitHub ，每 30 分钟自动 commit 一次。Claude Code 在终端工作，知道哪些文件是新的、哪些改过，版本追踪自然就有了。 Custom Attachment Location ：图片按文章名归类到 assets/文章名/ 子目录。Claude Code 读文章的时候结构清晰，不会被一堆散落的图片文件干扰。 Templater ：新建文章自动写入 Front Matter ，包括状态字段（草稿 / 已发布）。这是后面 Dataview 能查询写作进度的基础。 Dataview ：用类 SQL 语法查 Vault 里的文章。我用它列出所有草稿、按分类汇总文章数量，也方便 Claude Code 快速定位需要参考的内容。 Local Images Plus ：历史文章里的外链图片自动下载本地化。做完这步，整个 Vault 完全离线独立，不依赖任何服务器。 第一步：把历史文章变成结构化知识库 历史文章导入之后，先做两件事让知识库更好用。 一是统一目录结构。我按文章类型分了三个目录： VPS 测评/ 、 VPS 小白教程/ 、 金融/ ，草稿放 草稿/ ，灵感放 灵感收集/ 。结构清晰，Claude Code 在扫描文件的时候能更快定位。 二是给每篇文章加 Front Matter 标记状态。已发布的统一标 status: 已发布 ，方便后续只分析已发布内容，排除草稿干扰。 第二步：用 Claude Code 提炼风格档案 知识库搭好之后，让 Claude Code 读所有已发布文章，从几个维度做分析： 语气和人称 ：用不用「我」，怎么称呼读者 句式习惯 ：短句还是长句，有没有标志性的开头方式 结构偏好 ：怎么起头，怎么收尾，用不用步骤编号 内容特征 ：高频关键词，倾向用数据还是个人经历说话 文章长度 ：不同类型文章的字数范围 分析结果写入 Vault 根目录的 风格档案.md 。这个文件之后每次写文章都会被引用——相当于一份给 AI 的写作说明书，告诉它我习惯怎么写，不习惯怎么写。 有了这个文件，「用我的风格写一篇关于 X 的文章」这类需求才真正可靠。 风格档案不是一次性
eventKey: 写得像-用自己的-篇博客训练专属写作助手-顺手做成了一个-skill
normalizedTitle: 别让 ai 写得像 ai 用自己的 83 篇博客训练专属写作助手 顺手做成了一个 skill
scoreReasoning: Personal approach to training AI for writing style, relevant to AI and software development.
summary: I trained an AI to write in my voice by feeding it all 83 of my blog posts stored locally in an Obsidian vault. The AI, Claude Code, reads the Markdown files directly, analyzes tone, sentence style, structure, keywords and length, and writes a “style file” that guides future writing. I then wrapped the entire workflow—style analysis, idea generation, outline, draft, and final output—into a reusable Skill. Each step requires my confirmation, ensuring the final article truly reflects my style.

title: Claude Code 源代码泄露
content: AI 社区因 Claude Code 源代码泄露而疯狂。X 账号发帖称其通过 npm 注册表映射文件泄露，引发数百万浏览，网友迅速跟进分析。此次泄露源于约 57MB 的 cli.js.map 文件，包含 4756 个源文件完整内容，提取无门槛。恢复代码暴露了 Claude Code 整体架构及关键实现细节。社区挖出不少秘密，如员工专属「卧底模式」、「彩蛋」电子宠物、KAIROS 后台守护机制、神秘「水豚」模型、情绪监控等。事后 Anthropic 移除 source map，GitHub 提取源码仓库遭 DMCA 下架，但源码已广泛传播。这是 Anthropic 第二次犯此低级错误，GitHub 出现多个完整镜像仓库，相关项目星标和 fork 量激增。此次泄露为业界提供了参考，或许会促使各家公司 Agent 迎来大版本更新。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 AI 社区因 Claude Code 源代码泄露而疯狂。X 账号发帖称其通过 npm 注册表映射文件泄露，引发数百万浏览，网友迅速跟进分析。此次泄露源于约 57MB 的 cli.js.map 文件，包含 4756 个源文件完整内容，提取无门槛。恢复代码暴露了 Claude Code 整体架构及关键实现细节。社区挖出不少秘密，如员工专属「卧底模式」、「彩蛋」电子宠物、KAIROS 后台守护机制、神秘「水豚」模型、情绪监控等。事后 Anthropic 移除 source map， GitHub 提取源码仓库遭 DMCA 下架，但源码已广泛传播。这是 Anthropic 第二次犯此低级错误，GitHub 出现多个完整镜像仓库，相关项目星标和 fork 量激增。此次泄露为业界提供了参考，或许会促使各家公司 Agent 迎来大版本更新。 Claude Code 翻车！源代码直接「裸奔」，AI 开发者能「偷师」到哪些神级产品构架？ 网易科技 2026-04-01 Claude Code 开发团队回应源代码泄露：纯属人为失误 将改进自动化流程 2026-03-31 Claude Code 源代码泄露 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004
eventKey: claude-code-源代码泄露
normalizedTitle: claude code 源代码泄露
scoreReasoning: Claude Code源代码泄露，影响AI领域，信号强度高，对未来有重要影响，与个人相关性高。
summary: The Claude Code source code was exposed through a leaked 57 MB cli.js.map file that contained the full content of 4,756 source files. The leak revealed the system’s structure, key features—including a “spy mode,” an electronic pet Easter egg, a KAIROS background guardian, the mysterious “waterpanda” model, and emotional monitoring—prompting wide analysis on social media. After Anthropic removed the map and GitHub was temporarily DMCA‑taken down, the code spread widely, increasing forks and stars. This second major mistake may push other firms to update their agents.

title: Show HN: Cerno – CAPTCHA that targets LLM reasoning, not human biology
content: Open-source verification SDK. Maze interaction, motor-control analysis, server-side behavioral scoring. No ML inference. Human verification without hardware Motor-control analysis of maze interaction. Open-source TypeScript SDK. Open source. npm i @cernosh/react @cernosh/server Read Docs GitHub → DEMO Loading challenge... Preparing verification New maze PIPELINE 01 Proof of work SHA-256 hash prefix, 14–24 bits. Adaptive difficulty based on client signals. 02 Maze generation Growing Tree algorithm, seeded PRNG. Server regenerates from seed for trustless validation. 03 Motor-control analysis 12 behavioral features (7 public + 5 secret, server-only) extracted from raw pointer events. Scored against per-maze baselines. 04 Stroop probes Color-word interference at maze decision points. Server derives timing from event stream. 05 Signature binding ECDSA P-256 ephemeral keypair. Public key bound at challenge issuance, verified on submission. 06 Reputation Behavioral consistency across sessions. EMA trust scores keyed by stable device identifier. FEATURES EXTRACTED velocity_std Standard deviation of tangential velocity across 60Hz resampled trajectory. path_efficiency Euclidean start-to-exit distance divided by actual path length. pause_count Intervals where velocity < 0.0005 for ≥ 100ms. Correlated with maze decision points. movement_onset_ms Time from first event to first significant movement above threshold. jerk_std Standard deviation of the third derivative of position. angular_velocity_entropy Shannon entropy of direction changes across 16 angular bins. timing_cv

title: 突发！Claude Code 51万行源码全网裸奔：一场史诗级“开源”事故，国内大厂笑麻了
content: On March 31, Anthropic accidentally published the full 51.2‑million‑line TypeScript source of its Claude Code AI programming agent by bundling a source‑map file in an npm release. The error, a basic packaging oversight, exposed the complete agent infrastructure—architecture, tool‑integration logic, and hidden features—onto GitHub, where it quickly accrued thousands of stars. The leak damages Anthropic’s reputation and competitive edge while giving developers and Chinese tech firms a rare opportunity to copy and accelerate their own AI agent projects.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 一旅人

summary: On March 31, Anthropic accidentally published the full 51.2‑million‑line TypeScript source of its Claude Code AI programming agent by bundling a source‑map file in an npm release. The error, a basic packaging oversight, exposed the complete agent infrastructure—architecture, tool‑integration logic, and hidden features—onto GitHub, where it quickly accrued thousands of stars. The leak damages Anthropic’s reputation and competitive edge while giving developers and Chinese tech firms a rare opportunity to copy and accelerate their own AI agent projects.

title: “解放年”并未让美国工厂获得自由
content: The article argues that the so‑called “Liberation Year” did not bring genuine freedom to U.S. factories. Despite policies promising deregulation and anti‑trading‑restrictions, manufacturing remains constrained, labor conditions largely unchanged, and corporate interests continue to dominate. The piece highlights that structural issues and lingering protections still limit industrial autonomy, demonstrating that the year’s reforms fell short of truly liberating American manufacturing.

title: Accelerating software delivery with agentic QA automation using Amazon Nova Act
content: In this post, we demonstrate how to implement agentic QA automation through QA Studio, a reference solution built with Amazon Nova Act. You will see how to define tests in natural language that adapt automatically to UI changes, explore the serverless architecture that executes tests reliably at scale, and get step-by-step deployment guidance for your AWS environment. Artificial Intelligence Accelerating software delivery with agentic QA automation using Amazon Nova Act by Vinicius Pedroni , Jan Wiemers , and Ryan Canty on 31 MAR 2026 in Amazon Nova , Customer Solutions , Technical How-to Permalink Comments Share Quality assurance (QA) automation is critical for modern software delivery. It catches regressions before production, validates user journeys at scale, and enables confident feature releases. But traditional QA automation solutions are brittle and demand specialized programming knowledge, decelerating software delivery. Automation frameworks rely on implementation details including UI selectors, element identifiers, and structural references to navigate applications. When developers refactor UI code or designers adjust layouts, tests break even though functionality remains intact. This maintenance burden stems from a mismatch in how teams work. Product managers define acceptance criteria in the business language, development teams implement features, then developers write automation code. This puts distance between testing and those who understand user needs, forcing software teams to maintain tests instead of delivering features. These challenges are addressed by

title: Ministack (Replacement for LocalStack)
content: LocalStack is no longer free. MiniStack is. 33 AWS services, real database containers, 2-second startup. MIT licensed. LocalStack is no longer free. MiniStack is. 33 AWS services on a single port — with real Postgres, Redis, and Docker containers . No account, no license key, no telemetry. $ docker run -p 4566:4566 nahuelnucera/ministack copy ⚠️ LocalStack moved core services behind a paid plan. If you relied on LocalStack Community for local dev and CI/CD, MiniStack is your free, MIT-licensed drop-in replacement. No sign-up, no API key, no telemetry. # Start MiniStack $ docker run -p 4566:4566 nahuelnucera/ministack # Works with any AWS tool — no config changes $ aws --endpoint-url= http://localhost:4566 s3 mb s3://my-bucket make_bucket: my-bucket # Real database — RDS spins up actual Postgres $ aws --endpoint-url= http://localhost:4566 rds create-db-instance \ --db-instance-identifier mydb --engine postgres \ --master-username admin --master-user-password secret ✓ Real Postgres container running on localhost:15432 # Real Redis via ElastiCache $ aws --endpoint-url= http://localhost:4566 elasticache \ create-cache-cluster --cache-cluster-id my-redis --engine redis ✓ Real Redis container running on localhost:16379 Core AWS services plus real infrastructure — RDS runs actual databases, ElastiCache runs real Redis, ECS starts real Docker containers, Athena executes real SQL via DuckDB (when installed). Buckets, objects, versioning, encryption, lifecycle, CORS, Object Lock, replication

title: 世界杯预选赛，意大利点球 2-5 波黑，连续 3 届无缘世界杯，如何评价本场比赛？
content: In the World Cup qualifier, Bosnia beat Italy 5‑2 in regulation, with a 1‑1 draw after added time leading to penalties. Italy’s lone goal was from a Kalić wonder, and Italy also saw defender Mijatović receive a red card. Bosnia won the shootout 4‑1, ending Italy’s third straight miss from World‑Cup qualification.

Italy’s lone goal was from a Kalić wonder, and Italy also saw defender Mijatović receive a red card. Bosnia won the shootout 4‑1, ending Italy’s third straight miss from World‑Cup qualification.

title: 被称「摩托车圈雷军」，冠军张雪的飞驰人生 | 原文
content: Chinese motorcycle manufacturer Zhang Xue clinched a World Superbike Championship title in Portugal on March 28, becoming the first Chinese brand to win a major international middle‑class motorcycle race. The victory, achieved with a nearly four‑second margin, was celebrated passionately by the team in Chongqing. Zhang posted a video reflecting on the importance of pursuing passion over mere results, noting that loving what you do can lead to unexpected success.

title: 国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起上涨 5 倍
content: 多彩贵州航空通知，国内航线燃油附加费拟自 4 月 5 日上调，800 公里（含）以下航段从 10 元调至 60 元，800 公里以上航段从 20 元调至 120 元，涨幅 5 倍。此前国际航线燃油附加费已大幅上调，部分航线翻番。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 多彩贵州航空 通知，国内航线燃油附加费拟自 4 月 5 日上调，800 公里（含）以下航段从 10 元调至 60 元，800 公里以上航段从 20 元调至 120 元，涨幅 5 倍。此前国际航线燃油附加费已大幅上调，部分航线翻番。 多家机票代理收到通知：国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起涨 5 倍 800 公里以上调百元 财联社 多家机票代理收到通知：国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起涨 5 倍，800 公里以上调百元 钛媒体 2026-03-31 国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起上涨 5 倍 2026-03-26 国内航线燃油附加费确定 4 月 5 日上涨 2025-07-05 今天起 国内航线燃油附加费上调 2025-04-01 国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日下调 2025-01-28 国内航线燃油附加费 2 月 5 日起上涨 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004
eventKey: 国内航线燃油附加费-日起上涨
normalizedTitle: 国内航线燃油附加费 4 月 5 日起上涨 5 倍
scoreReasoning: Significant investment news, high future impact, relevant to investment decisions.
summary: DaiColor Guizhou Airlines announced that from April 5 domestic fuel surcharges will increase fivefold. For routes 800 km or shorter the fee rises from ¥10 to ¥60 per flight. For routes over 800 km it rises from ¥20 to ¥120. This follows a previous major increase on international routes, where some fees doubled.
